# FSFileSystemBase

**Protocol**

A protocol containing functionality supplied by FSKit to file system implementations.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol FSFileSystemBase : NSObjectProtocol
```

## Overview

Both [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSFileSystem] and [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSUnaryFileSystem] conform to this protocol.

## Implementing essential functionality

- **containerStatus**: The status of the file system container, indicating its readiness and activity.
- **wipe(_:completionHandler:)**: Wipes existing file systems on the specified resource.

## File systems

- **FSUnaryFileSystem**: An abstract base class for implementing a minimal file system.
- **FSFileName**: The name of a file, expressed as a data buffer.

## Inherits From

- NSObjectProtocol

## Conforming Types

- FSUnaryFileSystem
